title: Tellima williamsii
taxonomy: Tellima williamsii is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae. It is native to the western United States and is also known as fringecup. This perennial plant is known for its delicate white or pink flowers and is often found growing in woodland environments. The fringecup produces small, rounded leaves that are typically dark green in color. Tellima williamsii is a low-growing, spreading plant that thrives in moist, shaded areas.
